description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On May 2 (Saturday, Reiwa 8), I attended the regular general meeting of the Hanno City International Exchange Association, held at the Hanno City Civic Activity Center.

I would like to extend my sincere gratitude to the members of the Hanno City International Exchange Association for serving as the core of international exchange in our city. In order to realize a multicultural coexistence society, I ask for your continued support going forward.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202605/13533.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno City International Exchange Association Regular General Meeting, Fiscal Year 2026
